SECTION 01 — PROFILE

THE ANALYST
BEHIND THE DATA

I am Manirathinam, a Data & Business Analytics Specialist with a relentless focus on precision and measurable impact. Every dataset is a puzzle. Every insight, a competitive edge delivered.

My expertise bridges the gap between raw data and strategic action. I design intelligence systems — predictive models, interactive dashboards, and analytical frameworks — that empower organizations to make faster, smarter decisions.

With over 5 years of cross-industry experience, I have mastered the craft of transforming complex numbers into clear narratives that move companies and markets forward.
